underlying_goal: Continue implementation work on omega-gateway trace persistence that a previous Codex CLI session was working on before hitting rate limits
friction_detail: The persistence script failed due to directory/permission issues, and then Claude hit its own rate limit before resolving, leaving the user stuck.
brief_summary: User wanted to continue omega-gateway trace persistence work from a previous session; Claude diagnosed state and wrote a script but it failed on permissions, then Claude hit rate limits before fixing it.
